# RhombusKit

> Accessible, signal-based Angular 21 components built over Angular Material and themed by a frozen design-token contract. Light/dark theming with WCAG 2.1 AA verified in CI.

RhombusKit ships four npm packages, versioned and released in lockstep:

- `@rhombuskit/core` — standalone, signal-based Angular components
- `@rhombuskit/tokens` — framework-agnostic design-token contract (CSS / SCSS / TS)
- `@rhombuskit/theme-engine` — light / dark / system theming runtime
- `@rhombuskit/material-preset` — bridges Angular Material's M3 tokens onto the contract

Install: `pnpm add @rhombuskit/core @rhombuskit/tokens @rhombuskit/theme-engine`

## Documentation

- [Component reference](https://rhombuskit.online): live showcase — a page per component with variants, states, and accessibility notes
- [Theming guide](https://rhombuskit.online/theming): setup, runtime switching, custom themes, the Material bridge
- [Full API + token reference (for LLMs)](https://rhombuskit.online/llms-full.txt): the complete machine-readable API surface and design-token contract
- [MCP docs server](https://github.com/doug-williamson/RhombusKit/tree/main/packages/mcp): run `npx -y @rhombuskit/mcp` to query this API surface and the token CONTRACT interactively from Claude Code, Cursor, and other MCP clients
- [Source, issues & contributing](https://github.com/doug-williamson/RhombusKit)
